data.narrative:
Solar Foods is a publicly listed biotech company in the Health & Biotech sector that has raised $160M+ to date. The valuation analysis draws on a peer set of 3 same-stage, same-sector public comparables: Freenome ($2.6B), Recursion Pharmaceuticals ($1.8B), and Alto Neuroscience ($529M).

The peer-median method is the applicable triangulation approach here. The median valuation across these three public biotech peers is $1.8B, with a range spanning $529M at the low end to $2.6B at the high end. This method directly anchors on recent market transactions for companies at identical stage and sector positioning, making it the most reliable signal available. Revenue data for Solar Foods is not on file, which precludes application of public-comp P/S multiples (the sector median stands at 6.1x across three tickers, but without the target's top-line this multiple cannot be deployed).

The analysis supports a valuation range of $1.5B (low) to $2.1B (high), centered on a median of $1.8B. This range reflects natural variance around the peer median rather than application of multiple independent methods. Key uncertainties include Solar Foods' actual revenue and profitability relative to peers, as well as capital efficiency post-IPO, neither of which are reflected in this quantitative framework. The narrow methodological foundation—one applicable approach—also limits conviction in precision beyond order-of-magnitude positioning.
